mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_client_config (source_type, source_id, target_type, target_id, ext_param, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{extParam}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, source_type, source_id, target_type, target_id, ext_param, status, create_time, update_time FROM ai_client_config WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, source_type, source_id, target_type, target_id, ext_param, status, create_time, update_time FROM ai_client_config WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
